name: startup-harness
description: Autonomous startup builder — idea to deployed company. 121 skills (37 OMC + 84 custom), 32 agents, deterministic skill-chain enforcement across 4 flows, hooks on all 11 Claude Code event types, bundled OMC runtime + MCP server + bridge CLI. Standalone: no dependency on the oh-my-claudecode plugin. Validated: built 3 startups (B2C, devtool, B2B SaaS) from single sentences.
